
```{python}
import polars as pl
from pyprojroot.here import here
```


```{python}
src = here("01_data/raw/us_congress/legislators-historical.json")
df_raw = pl.read_json(src, infer_schema_length=None)

print(df_raw.shape)
df_raw.head(3)
```


```{python}
df_people = df_raw.unnest(["id", "name", "bio"])

people = (
	df_people
	.with_columns(
		pl.col("terms").list.len().fill_null(0).alias("n_terms"),
		pl.col("other_names").list.len().fill_null(0).alias("n_other_names"),
		pl.col("birthday").str.strptime(pl.Date, strict=False),
	)
	.rename(
		{
			"first": "first_name",
			"middle": "middle_name",
			"last": "last_name",
		}
	)
	.select(
		"bioguide",
		"first_name",
		"middle_name",
		"last_name",
		"suffix",
		"nickname",
		"official_full",
		"birthday",
		"gender",
		"govtrack",
		"icpsr",
		"house_history",
		"thomas",
		"lis",
		"cspan",
		"wikipedia",
		"wikidata",
		"google_entity_id",
		"n_terms",
		"n_other_names",
		"terms",
		"other_names",
	)
)

people.head(10)
```


```{python}
terms = (
	people
	.select("bioguide", "terms")
	.explode("terms")
	.drop_nulls("terms")
	.unnest("terms")
	.with_columns(
		pl.col("start").str.strptime(pl.Date, strict=False),
		pl.col("end").str.strptime(pl.Date, strict=False),
	)
	.rename({"class": "senate_class", "type": "chamber"})
	.with_columns(
		(pl.col("end") - pl.col("start")).dt.total_days().alias("term_days")
	)
)

terms.head(10)
```

```{python}
people_flat = people.drop(["terms", "other_names", "suffix", "nickname", "official_full", "thomas", "lis", "cspan"])
people_flat.write_csv(here("01_data/intermediate/politicians.csv"))
people_flat.head(10)
```


```{python}
people_summary = people.select(
	pl.len().alias("n_people"),
	pl.col("bioguide").n_unique().alias("n_unique_bioguide"),
	pl.col("n_terms").sum().alias("total_terms_declared"),
	pl.col("n_other_names").sum().alias("total_other_names"),
)

terms_summary = terms.select(
	pl.len().alias("n_term_rows"),
	pl.col("chamber").n_unique().alias("n_chambers"),
	pl.col("state").n_unique().alias("n_states"),
	pl.col("party").n_unique().alias("n_parties"),
)

people_summary
```


```{python}
terms_summary
```


```{python}
people.null_count().transpose(include_header=True, header_name="column", column_names=["n_null"]) \
	.sort("n_null", descending=True) \
	.head(15)
```

```{python}

```
